stemHtml: Why can't you find the user waypoint you entered 2 months ago?

options.a: At some point after the waypoint was entered, the battery of the aircraft was disconnected and this reset the navigation database.
options.b: Because the out of storage, the system deleted the oldest waypoint that you entered to make a place for the new one.
options.c: Waypoints are deleted after every single flight, so it was deleted.
options.d: The navigation database was updated and the waypoint was deleted during the process.
